notableEvents.label: Manny Machado GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado grounds into a double play, shortstop Trea Turner to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Xander Bogaerts out at 2nd. Manny Machado out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts reaches on a fielder's choice. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 3rd. Miguel Andujar to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop Trea Turner.

notableEvents.label: Bryce Harper GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Harper grounds into a double play, second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France. Kyle Schwarber out at 2nd. Bryce Harper out at 1st.
